description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this cherry red shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. The bag is large enough to accomodate all your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get apprecaitive glances all day long. The versatile bag looks as great with casual outfits as it does with your formal wear. Time to take the office by storm, and be the coolest chick at the mall too! Made of leather for enhanced durability and styleTwo roomy zippered compartments with inner zippered pocket to hold essentialsSmall zippered compartment at the back, and two zippered pouches on the front for stowing essentialsContrast thread detailing for added attractionTwo padded short handles for ease of carrying and extra comfortMetal loops for the handles with stud detailing for added styleBranded zippers and sliders for easy useBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
